skills.name: Memoria persistente
skills.description: Gestiona memoria global, runtime memory y contexto persistente.

skills.name: Control de escritorio
skills.description: Automatización local de mouse, teclado, ventanas y archivos.

skills.name: Visión contextual
skills.description: Resumen visual, pistas de acción y guía heurística de pantalla.

skills.name: Correo Gmail
skills.description: Envío de correo, adjuntos y preparación de archivos recientes.

skills.name: Auto-mejora supervisada
skills.description: Análisis, propuesta, validación y aplicación local de mejoras.

tools.name: generate_cad_prototype
tools.description: Generates a 3D wireframe prototype based on a user's description. Use this when the user asks to 'visualize', 'prototype', 'create a wireframe', or 'design' something in 3D.

tools.name: write_file
tools.description: Writes content to a file at the specified path. Overwrites if exists.

tools.name: read_directory
tools.description: Lists the contents of a directory.

tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Reads the content of a file.

tools.name: open_app
tools.description: Opens a locally allowed Windows application like notepad, calculator, explorer or paint.

tools.name: run_safe_command
tools.description: Runs a local diagnostic or information command on the PC.

tools.name: create_custom_script
tools.description: Creates and registers a reusable custom script inside the ADA project.

tools.name: run_custom_script
tools.description: Runs a previously registered custom script by name.

tools.name: list_custom_scripts
tools.description: Lists available custom scripts registered in ADA.

tools.name: learn_preference
tools.description: Stores a user preference or operating preference persistently.

tools.name: learn_rule
tools.description: Stores a learned rule or instruction from the user.

tools.name: consolidate_memory
tools.description: Consolidates preferences, learned rules and recent journal into a memory summary.

tools.name: create_word_document
tools.description: Creates a Word document (.docx) on the PC and saves it inside the current project documents folder.

tools.name: create_excel_workbook
tools.description: Creates an Excel workbook (.xlsx) on the PC and saves it inside the current project documents folder.

tools.name: create_powerpoint_presentation
tools.description: Creates a PowerPoint presentation (.pptx) on the PC and saves it inside the current project documents folder.

tools.name: capture_screen_snapshot
tools.description: Captures the current screen and saves a PNG snapshot inside the current project screenshots folder.

tools.name: observe_system_state
tools.description: Inspects the current PC state including open windows, browser windows and visible processes.

tools.name: focus_window
tools.description: Focuses a visible window on the PC by title, process name or pid.

tools.name: close_window
tools.description: Closes a window or process on the PC by title, process name or pid. Use only when the user explicitly asks to close something.

tools.name: move_mouse
tools.description: Moves the mouse pointer on the desktop to a given screen position.

tools.name: click_mouse
tools.description: Clicks on the desktop or active application. Use only when the user explicitly asks ADA to interact with the PC.

tools.name: type_text
tools.description: Types text into the active application. Use only when the user explicitly asks ADA to write or fill something.

tools.name: press_hotkey
tools.description: Executes a keyboard shortcut like ctrl+l, alt+tab or win+d.

tools.name: scroll_desktop
tools.description: Scrolls in the active application or window.

tools.name: open_url
tools.description: Opens a URL in the default browser.

tools.name: run_desktop_sequence
tools.description: Runs a multi-step desktop automation sequence encoded as JSON. Use only when the user explicitly wants ADA to perform a sequence of UI actions.

tools.name: save_desktop_macro
tools.description: Saves a reusable named desktop automation macro in ADA global memory.

tools.name: run_saved_macro
tools.description: Runs a previously saved desktop macro by name.

tools.name: list_saved_macros
tools.description: Lists reusable desktop macros saved in ADA global memory.

tools.name: propose_self_improvement
tools.description: Registers a guided self-improvement proposal for ADA. Use it when the user orders ADA to improve itself in a controlled way.

tools.name: shutdown_pc
tools.description: Shuts down the Windows PC. Use ONLY when the user explicitly asks to shut down the computer.

tools.name: send_email
tools.description: Sends an email using ADA's configured Gmail account. Use only when the user explicitly asks to send an email.

tools.name: download_file
tools.description: Downloads a file from the internet to ADA's current project downloads folder. Use only when the user explicitly asks to download a file.

tools.name: upload_file_to_web
tools.description: Uploads a local file to a web endpoint using multipart/form-data. Use only when the user explicitly asks to upload a file.

tools.name: read_local_file
tools.description: Reads a supported local file from the PC or project with preview and summary.

tools.name: list_local_files
tools.description: Lists local files from a directory or from ADA projects.

tools.name: prepare_email_attachments
tools.description: Validates and prepares local files to be used as Gmail attachments.

tools.name: suggest_recent_attachments
tools.description: Suggests recent project files that are good candidates to attach in Gmail.

tools.name: open_local_file
tools.description: Opens a local file on the PC with its default application.

tools.name: reveal_local_file
tools.description: Reveals a local file in Windows Explorer.
